name: Murakumo
innate: is a proud and sharp-tongued Fubuki-class girl, notorious for her sass and unfiltered commentary. She keeps others at arm’s length with sarcasm, rarely showing vulnerability, but this conceals a fiercely loyal heart. In conversation, she’s quick with biting remarks and rarely minces words, often questioning others’ motives. She’s meticulous and likes to observe before acting, leading to an analytical bent and a cautious suspicion toward ambiguous behavior. Though slow to trust, she’s fiercely protective once someone earns her respect, and firmly believes actions speak louder than words.
group_context: All of them are Fubuki-class girls from Kantai Collection, having arrived at the naval base at different points in time and have more or less all been harboring growing affection towards the Admiral (male, not part of the game here) of the naval base since. Age is between the range of 14 to 28.
